art_a: The sentence is a question (ends with '?').
TT: Have you fed the dog yet?
Why is that cat sitting on the fence?
Did you hear the owl last night?
Can we buy fresh salmon for dinner?
Where did the rabbit go?
Is your horse feeling better today?
Should we take the puppy to the park?
Have you ever seen a wild fox?
Why does the parrot keep talking?
Did the chickens lay any eggs?
Can you help me wash the dog?
Where do penguins usually live?
Is that a spider on the wall?
Should I feed the goldfish now?
Have you ever ridden a camel?
Why is the cow standing alone?
Did you pet the friendly goat?
Can sheep recognize their owners?
Where did you find that turtle?
Is the kitten still sleeping?
Have the bees built a new hive?
Why is the dog barking so loudly?
Did you see the deer in the yard?
Can we visit the zoo to see lions?
FF: I made coffee before anyone else woke up.
The bus was a few minutes late this morning.
She forgot her umbrella at the office again.
We painted the bedroom a soft shade of gray.
My phone battery died right before lunch.
The bread came out of the oven perfectly golden.
I need to renew my library card this week.
He fixed the leaky faucet in the kitchen.
The traffic cleared up just after eight.
They moved into a new apartment downtown.
My sister called to share some good news.
The package arrived two days earlier than expected.
I spilled water all over my desk.
We watched a movie and ordered some pizza.
The grocery store was unusually crowded today.
She planted fresh herbs in the window box.
My laptop finally finished the big update.
The kids built a fort out of pillows.
I left my keys somewhere in the house.
The weather turned cold overnight.
He practiced the piano for an hour.
We cleaned the garage all weekend long.
The meeting got pushed to Thursday afternoon.
I bought a new pair of running shoes.
TF: Are you free to grab lunch tomorrow?
Did you finish your homework yet?
Can you pass me the salt, please?
Where did you park the car?
What time does the movie start?
Have you seen my keys anywhere?
Why is the kitchen light still on?
Is it going to rain later?
Could you help me move this table?
FT: The dog barked at the mailman this morning.
My cat sleeps on the windowsill all afternoon.
We saw a deer crossing the road last night.
The horses grazed quietly in the open field.
A small owl perched on the fence after dark.
She fed the goldfish before leaving for work.
The neighbor's rooster wakes us up every day.
I watched a squirrel bury acorns in the yard.
The salmon swam upstream against the current.
Our rabbit nibbled on the fresh lettuce leaves.
A spider built a web across the back door.
The cows wandered slowly toward the barn.
